Patch Set 11: Code-Review-1

(5 comments)

Hi Mamed,
I tested the code, and it did not work for me. The generated delete request fails in userparams validation in api-handler. But the child delete request should have any resources in userParams at all. It should also not have relatedInstances. The builder logic should not be the same for delete as for create. Let's do a call next week and I can share the details.
